title: ophrys holosericea subsp. pollinensis
intro: Ophrys holosericea subsp. pollinensis is a sub-species of the Bee Orchid, a type of flowering plant belonging to the Orchidaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ophrys holosericea subsp. pollinensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
